applicability: analytics, crash, metrics, traces, and diagnostic buffering
exception_policy: Bind the exact signal, fields, data class, purpose, owner, approving authorities, compensating controls, expiry, and removal plan; no exception permits secrets, undisclosed collection, or unbounded cardinality, buffering, retry, or retention.
rationale: Production diagnosis requires typed, correlated, privacy-safe, bounded, and owned signals whose analytics meaning remains outside Views.
review_cadence: Review material instrumentation changes immediately and the complete owned taxonomy, retention, buffers, dashboards, and alerts on the organization-defined operating cadence and after incidents or policy changes.
title: Observability and Operability
